sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n72859" key="o)ktwkaidekaethri/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀκτωκαιδεκα-ετηρίς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ίδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n72859.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">period of eighteen years,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ptol.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Alm.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.3</biblScope></bibl>, al.</sense> </entryFree>
